zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Cross於1640年12月10日出生在美國緬因州約克威爾斯時，她的父親John Cross30歲，母親Joan Francis Backler11637歲。她於1658年11月1日與Roger Hill在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1696年6月24日在她的家鄉享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Cross于1640年12月10日出生在美国缅因州約克威爾斯时，她的父亲John Cross30岁，母亲Joan Francis Backler11637岁。她于1658年11月1日与Roger Hill在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1696年6月24日在她的家乡享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cross
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near a cross, such as one set up by the roadside or in a marketplace, from Middle English cros (Old English cros and Old Norse kross, ultimately from Latin crux, crucem). It is commonly Latinized in medieval records as ad crucem and de Cruce but examples of this can just as well belong to the synonymous but less common name Crouch . In a few cases the surname may have been given originally to someone who lived by a crossroads, but this sense of the word seems to have been a comparatively late development. In other cases, the surname (and its European cognates; see 3 below) may have denoted someone who carried the cross in processions of the Christian Church, but in English at least the usual word for this sense was Crozier .
Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cross’ or ‘the cross’, such as French Lacroix , German Kreutz , and Slovenian and Croatian Križ (see Kriz ).

variants.name: Crouch
meanings: English (southeastern): from Middle English crouch(e), cruch(e) ‘cross’ (Old English crūc, ultimately from Latin crux, crucem; the Old English crūc was replaced in Middle English by the word cross, from Old Norse kross), applied as a topographic name for someone who lived by a cross.

variants.name: Croce
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Angelo, Carlo, Nicola, Salvatore, Vito, Antonio, Gino, Rocco, Saverio, Amadeo, Amerigo.

from croce ‘cross’ (from Latin crux, genitive crucis), applied as a topographic name for someone who lived by a roadside cross, or a nickname for someone who carried the cross in religious processions. Compare English Cross .

variants.name: Grose
meanings: Cornish: topographic name for someone who lived near a stone cross set up by the roadside or in a marketplace, Cornish crous (from Latin crux, crucis). Compare Cross .
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Gross  .

variants.name: Crosse
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cross  .

variants.name: Kreutz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Bernhard, Gottfried, Orlo, Reinhold.
German: topographic name for someone who lived near a cross set up by the roadside, in a marketplace, or as a field or boundary marker, from Middle High German kriuz(e) ‘cross’. Compare Cross .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Cross was born on 10 December 1640, in Wells, York, Maine, United States, her father, John Cross, was 30 and her mother, Joan Francis Backler, was 11637. She married Roger Hill on 1 November 1658, in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 24 June 1696, in her hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Cross est née le 10 décembre 1640, à Wells, York, Maine, États-Unis, son père, John Cross, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joan Francis Backler, avait 11637 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Hill le 1 novembre 1658, à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 juin 1696, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Cross am 10. Dezember 1640 in Wells, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Cross 30 und ihre Mutter Joan Francis Backler 11637. Sie hat am 1. November 1658 in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Roger Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. Juni 1696 im Alter von 55 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Cross è nata il il 10 dicembre 1640 nel Wells, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, John Cross, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Joan Francis Backler, aveva 11637 anni. Lei sposato Roger Hill il 1 novembre 1658, nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 24 giugno 1696, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.Saco, York, Massachusetts, United States: アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ヨークサコ
ja.Wells, York, Province of Maine, Massachu: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウエルズ
ja.lifeSummary: Mary Crossが1640年12月10日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークウエルズで生まれた時，父John Crossは30歳，母Joan Francis Backlerは11637歳であった。1658年11月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーでRoger Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1696年6月24日に故郷で55歳で死去した。

ko.Oyster River, Durham, Strafford, New Ham: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 뒤람 이스터 라이버
ko.Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 웰스
ko.Saco, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 사코
ko.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이
ko.Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 비데퍼드
ko.Wells, York, Province of Maine, Massachu: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 웰스
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Cross(이)가 1640년 12월 10일 미국 메인 주 요르크 웰스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Cross(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Francis Backler(은)는 11637세였다. 그녀는 1658년 11월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 Roger Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1696년 6월 24일 그녀의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Cross nasceu em 10 de dezembro de 1640, em Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Cross, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joan Francis Backler, tinha 11637 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Hill em 1 de novembro de 1658, em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de junho de 1696, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Cross родилась 10 декабря 1640 г. в местности веллс, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени John Cross было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Francis Backler, 11637. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Hill 1 ноября 1658 г. в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 24 июня 1696 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Cross nació el 10 de diciembre de 1640, en Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos, su papá, John Cross, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Joan Francis Backler, tenía 11637 años. Se casó con Roger Hill el 1 de noviembre de 1658, en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 24 de junio de 1696, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años.
